notes: I get an error that syas I need an up to date version of Ageia PhysX and associated DLLs.  Please install latest PhysX runtime
title: Bionic Commando: Rearmed

notes:
Works fine once you install Physx. Run this on the command line:
WINEPREFIX=~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/21680/pfx/ winetricks physx
title: Bionic Commando: Rearmed
